name: Hamburger Pasties
recipeIngredient: 11 oz Pie Crust Mix or Sticks (1 pkg)
recipeInstructions:
Vegetables should be drained. You can use either peas, diced carrots, or a mixture of both.
Use either American or Cheddar cheese.
- Preheat the oven to 375°F.
- Cook and stir meat and onion in a large skillet until meat is brown. Drain excess fat and remove from heat.
- Stir in remaining ingredients except pie crust mix; set aside.
- Prepare pastry as for a 2-crust pie according to package directions.
- Divide pastry into 8 equal parts. Roll each part into a 7-inch circle on lightly floured surface.
- On half of the circle, spread about 1/4 cup meat mixture (packed), leaving at least 1/2 inch from edge.
- Moisten edge of pastry with water and fold over filling, sealing edges with fork.
- Place on ungreased baking sheet; prick tops with fork.
- Bake 30 to 35 minutes. Serve as sandwiches or top with gravy or sauce.
